# BRUChat

> Bru Chat / Bru Messenger — a private encrypted messenger with group chats, voice notes, social posts, reels, and YouTube. Built in Kigali, Rwanda by INEZA AIME BRUNO.

BRUChat (also spelled Bru Chat, BruChat, Bru Messenger, BruMessenger) is a real-time messaging and social platform. Users sign in to chat one-on-one, join group conversations, share social posts, browse reels, and discover YouTube shorts and videos shared by the community.

## Pages

- [Home](/): Landing page, product overview, sign-in entry points.
- [Donate](/donate): Support the project via MoMo (Rwanda).
- [YouTube hub](/youtube): Public hub linking to community shorts and videos.

## Optional

- [Sign up](/signup): Create a BRUChat account.
- [Log in](/login): Sign in to an existing account.
